understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level without landing on spike tiles ('u'/'v'), completing levels efficiently within the turn and attempt limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK/UNDO. After any horizontal move, the character automatically travels in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid support tile (e.g., o/m/w), reaches the goal, or hits a hazard; landing on spikes ends the attempt immediately. CLICK targets a specific grid coordinate to interact with clickable tiles—primarily removing breakable 'x' blocks to open or change fall paths—and does not consume platform movement timers when present. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a mistake.
